java.security.cert/Option/SOFT_FAIL.name: SOFT_FAIL
java.security.cert/Option/SOFT_FAIL.description:
Allow revocation check to succeed if the revocation status cannot be
determined for one of the following reasons:

 The CRL or OCSP response cannot be obtained because of a
     network error.

info.excerpt:
Allow revocation check to succeed if the revocation status cannot be
determined for one of the following reasons:

 The CRL or OCSP response cannot be obtained because of a
     network error.

java.security.cert/CRLReason/SUPERSEDED.name: SUPERSEDED
java.security.cert/CRLReason/SUPERSEDED.description: This reason indicates that the certificate has been superseded.

info.excerpt: This reason indicates that the certificate has been superseded.

java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setAny.name: setAnyPolicyInhibited
java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setAny.description:
Sets state to determine if the any policy OID should be processed
if it is included in a certificate.

info.excerpt:
Sets state to determine if the any policy OID should be processed
if it is included in a certificate.

java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setCer.name: setCertPathCheckers
java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setCer.description: Sets aListof additional certification path checkers.

info.excerpt: Sets aListof additional certification path checkers.

java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setCer.name: setCertStores
java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setCer.description:
Sets the list ofCertStores to be used in finding
certificates and CRLs.

info.excerpt:
Sets the list ofCertStores to be used in finding
certificates and CRLs.

java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setDat.name: setDate
java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setDat.description:
Sets the time for which the validity of the certification path
should be determined.

info.excerpt:
Sets the time for which the validity of the certification path
should be determined.

java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setIni.name: setInitialPolicies
java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setIni.description:
Sets theSetof initial policy identifiers
(OID strings), indicating that any one of these
policies would be acceptable to the certificate user for the purposes of
certification path processing.

info.excerpt:
Sets theSetof initial policy identifiers
(OID strings), indicating that any one of these
policies would be acceptable to the certificate user for the purposes of
certification path processing.

java.security.cert/X509CRLSelector/setIs.name: setIssuerNames
java.security.cert/X509CRLSelector/setIs.description:
Note:usesetIssuers(Collection)instead
or only specify the byte array form of distinguished names when using
this method.

info.excerpt:
Note:usesetIssuers(Collection)instead
or only specify the byte array form of distinguished names when using
this method.

java.security.cert/X509CertSelector/setM.name: setMatchAllSubjectAltNames
java.security.cert/X509CertSelector/setM.description:
Enables/disables matching all of the subjectAlternativeNames
specified in thesetSubjectAlternativeNamesoraddSubjectAlternativeNamemethods.

info.excerpt:
Enables/disables matching all of the subjectAlternativeNames
specified in thesetSubjectAlternativeNamesoraddSubjectAlternativeNamemethods.

java.security.cert/PKIXBuilderParameters.name: setMaxPathLength
java.security.cert/PKIXBuilderParameters.description:
Sets the value of the maximum number of non-self-issued intermediate
certificates that may exist in a certification path.

info.excerpt:
Sets the value of the maximum number of non-self-issued intermediate
certificates that may exist in a certification path.

java.security.cert/PKIXRevocationChecker.name: setOcspExtensions
java.security.cert/PKIXRevocationChecker.description: Sets the optional OCSP request extensions.

info.excerpt: Sets the optional OCSP request extensions.

java.security.cert/PKIXRevocationChecker.name: setOcspResponder
java.security.cert/PKIXRevocationChecker.description: Sets the URI that identifies the location of the OCSP responder.

info.excerpt: Sets the URI that identifies the location of the OCSP responder.

java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setTar.name: setTargetCertConstraints
java.security.cert/PKIXParameters/setTar.description: Sets the required constraints on the target certificate.

info.excerpt: Sets the required constraints on the target certificate.
